candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows 100% conviction SHORT but green_matches=0, treat conviction as unconfirmed and require a non-zero historical green_match before sizing above 0.5x.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier = min(size_multiplier, 0.5)
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
